metadata.description: CI/CD skills for OpenCI workflow library

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Review pull requests for bugs, regressions, security risks, and missing tests.

plugins.name: pr-test-gen
plugins.description: Generate test cases for newly added functions and classes in a PR diff.

plugins.name: issue-triage
plugins.description: Classify and prioritize newly opened issues with labels, priority, and next actions.

plugins.name: ci-smoke-eval
plugins.description: Run smoke evaluation against a freshly built Docker image.

plugins.name: stg-agent-test
plugins.description: Run L1-L4 autonomous tests against a staging deployment.

plugins.name: ops-error-triage
plugins.description: Deduplicate Sentry errors against existing GitHub issues and decide whether to file new ones.

plugins.name: ops-summarize-failure
plugins.description: Summarize a CI failure into a single sentence for on-call engineers.

plugins.name: ops-flag-audit
plugins.description: Audit feature flags against the live registry and identify cleanup candidates.

plugins.name: observability-health-report
plugins.description: Synthesize a daily health report from telemetry data (Sentry, metrics, deploys, alerts).

plugins.name: agents-ai-changelog
plugins.description: Generate release notes in Keep a Changelog style from commit history.

plugins.name: agents-docubot
plugins.description: Answer questions about repository documentation and source code with cited file paths.
